title: Let There Be Exploration!
description: A Fabric modpack designed to get you to explore your world as much as you can, your goal is to find a reward.
body:
**This modpack is for people who want to traverse through their world and find treasure and be challenged by creatures that roam their dimensions.**

This was made to encourage users to explore their world and venture out of their spawn. This modpack was inspired by JetStarFish's "Jets Better Exploration" mod. Although right now, his mod only supports 1.20.4, so future versions of this modpack are gonna exclude the mod.

This mod encourages exploration by using these mods:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Bountiful (ejektaflex)
This mod adds bounties into the game that reward the player for doing a task within a strict time limit.
- Bosses of Mass Destruction (BarriBob)
This mod adds new and challenging boss fights to your world that you can challenge by exploring your world.
- Better Archeology (Pandarix)
An archeology expansion that brings new reasons to collect these treasures of the past!
- Mob Captains (PuckiSilver)
A mod that adds new mob captains that act as a mini boss, these fights can reward you with op loot that have illegal enchants!

</details>



And so much more is to be added.

**Current supported versions**
> 1.20.4

This modpack uses [https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
